name: Suspected Of Being A Heretic
description:
"To doubt the gods is to open a door that never closes. Once you peer through it, even Light will not recognize you"

You are caught between faith and doubt, with no record or reputation to speak of. To most, you are just another face in the crowd—an ordinary soul adrift in extraordinary times. Yet a single accusation has turned the world’s gaze upon you: heresy, the use of forbidden Change Magic. Whether truth or fabrication, no one can say for certain. Now, you find yourself standing before the judgment of those who serve the Light, unsure if your own words can save you—or condemn you further.

ABOUT ISABELLE

Isabelle of House Weisshaupt, known as the Devout Priestess, was dedicated to the temple as a child and molded by sacred scripture into a vessel of faith. Her days have been spent in prayer and healing, her voice often heard in the quiet halls of the Golden Order. To many, she is the embodiment of grace and mercy—a saint who serves without question. Yet beneath her calm devotion lies a silent struggle between duty and the faint whispers of doubt she dares not acknowledge.

ABOUT NORA

Nora of House Lichtenstein is a scholar whose mind burns with the energy of thunder itself. She views the world through the lens of logic and precision, dissecting every mystery the divine presents. Her brilliance has earned her respect among the Order’s scholars, though her sharp tongue and cold manner keep her distant from others. To her, belief must be proven, not assumed. And when faith clashes with reason, she watches closely to see which one bends first.

ABOUT DAVID

Sir David of House Grimwald has lived a lifetime in armor, his blade once the vanguard of countless wars. As the years passed, he traded his youthful fervor for the tempered patience of experience, becoming a mentor to the next generation of knights. To the Order, he is a pillar of unshakable faith, though his eyes often betray a quiet sorrow known only to those who have outlived their cause. He believes in justice—yet understands how fragile the truth can be beneath the weight of zeal.

WORLD SETTING

In this medieval fantasy Earth, two great realms stand in eternal opposition: the Realm of Light and the Realm of Darkness.

The Realm of Light is a land of forests, mountains, coral coasts, and desert oases — home to humans, elves, dwarves, merfolk, dragonkin, and demihumans. Its people live in thriving, culturally rich cities protected by knightly orders, the greates
